headline: Bachelorette YANKED 💥🍑 After Taylor Frankie Paul's DV Drama Drop 🔥👋
text:
ABC 🚫💔 just PULLED the PLUG 🔌🍆 on Bachelorette's fresh season cuz TikTok Mormon MILF 👰‍♀️📱 Taylor Frankie Paul got CAUGHT 🎥😱 SLAMMING her ex-boo Dakota Mortensen 🥊💥 in 2023 footage that DROPPED like a BAD VIBE BOMB 💣📰 via TMZ sleuths 🕵️‍♂️🔥! Reality starlet from Hulu's Secret Lives of Mormon Wives 🕍🍑 – yeah, those #MomTok queens 👑💃 twerking parenting hacks while SWINGING 👫🍆 with other couples – got ARRESTED 🚔👮‍♀️ and PLEADED GUILTY 🙏😢 to aggravated assault, US media SPILLING the TEA ☕🫖!

Paul's rep 💅📢 says she's ALL IN 🛡️ on fam safety, 'prepping to OWN her messy STORY 📖💦' like a true influencer glow-up ✨😤. Daddy Dakota, father of her THIRD BABY 👶💕, dropping statement: 'FOCUSED on our lil' dude's SAFETY 🛡️👦!' Disney overlords 🏰🐭 (ABC's big boss) YANKED it FAST AF 🚀 'cuz NEW VID surfaced TODAY 🌅📹' – premiere was SUNDAY SLAY 🗓️💃 but now it's GONE GIRL 👻🚫, no deets on filler slot 😩🤷‍♀️.

Taylor was HYPING on GMA Wednesday 🌅☕, all 'HEADLINES HEAVY 😰📱 during my BACHELORETTE BANGER TIME 🎉💔!' Production PAUSED ⏸️ on Mormon Wives S5 too – co-star Mikayla Matthews 📱💋 said 'WE GIRLS VOTED NOPE ❌ cuz VIBES OFF 👻😬!' From #MomTok dance divas 🕺📹 in Utah LDS crew 🙏🌵, she BLEW UP in 2022 DIVORCE DROP 💔🚨 announcing hubby swaps with SWINGER COUPLES 👯‍♂️🍑 – pure Hulu GOLD 🥇📺!

Post-split, she LOCKED IN with Dakota 📱❤️ who popped up on the show, but now it's ALL DRAMA QUEEN 👑😡 – Bachelorette simps CRYING 😭💧 over no rose ceremonies 🌹🚫, while Mormon Wives squad PAUSING like 'NOT TODAY SATAN 😈⏹️!' Taylor's THICC scandal backlog 📦💥 got networks SWEATING 😰💦 – is this the END of her rose-tinted reality reign 👸🌹 or just PRIME TIME PUNISHMENT ⏰🍑? #MomTok MELTDOWN 🚀😂‼️
